_publications._publicationTitle: Early differences in auditory processing relate to Autism Spectrum Disorder traits in infants with Neurofibromatosis Type I.

_contextSnippet: This showed that the NF1 group showed lower language skills at 5 months, but not 10 months, than the TD group, and lower cognitive and motor skills at 10 months.
details: NF1 group showed lower language skills at 5 months but not 10 months compared to TD group, and lower cognitive and motor skills at 10 months
